data.description:
## What
Introduce a single typed Config (stdlib dataclass) as the source of truth, extending the existing src/rebar/config.py (55 LOC) per the module-size policy — do NOT spawn a sub-100-LOC file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Typed Config dataclass with defaults for the live keys (verify.require_signature_for_close, ticket.display_mode) + validation
- [ ] Loud handling of unknown keys (warn) — no silent drop
- [ ] Unit tests for parse/validate/defaults
Blocked by the ADR task.
data.title: Central typed Config dataclass (extend src/rebar/config.py)
